differential_diagnoses: Autoimmune encephalitis (e.g., anti-LGI1 or anti-NMDA receptor encephalitis)
next_steps: Perform lumbar puncture for CSF analysis (cell count, protein, glucose, autoimmune encephalitis panel, paraneoplastic panel, and infectious workup)
Obtain serum autoimmune and paraneoplastic antibody panels
Perform whole-body PET/CT or CT chest/abdomen/pelvis to screen for occult malignancy
Obtain continuous video EEG monitoring to differentiate between ictal, postictal, and interictal events
Consider empiric treatment with high-dose intravenous corticosteroids, intravenous immunoglobulin, or plasma exchange
Consult psychiatry for management of severe agitation and delusional symptoms
Review current medication regimen to exclude drug-induced neuropsychiatric symptoms
